title: Because of You Ka Kui
synopsis: An emotional cinematic tribute & music event film dedicated to the life, artistry, and enduring legacy of Canto rock legend Wong Ka Kui. Through intimate conversations with those closest to him, Because of You Ka Kui reveals the man behind the music offering a rare and deeply human perspective on the voice that defined a generation.

synopsis_lang.en: An emotional cinematic tribute & music event film dedicated to the life, artistry, and enduring legacy of Canto rock legend Wong Ka Kui. Through intimate conversations with those closest to him, Because of You Ka Kui reveals the man behind the music offering a rare and deeply human perspective on the voice that defined a generation.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
他的信念跨越時代，他的音樂依然振奮人心，但你對他的認識又有多深？大銀幕致敬香港音樂傳奇—黃家駒！今年是家駒逝世的33周年紀念，電影將帶樂迷深入認識這位殿堂級樂隊Beyond的靈魂人物，回顧他傳奇的音樂旅程。電影除了包括超過30分鐘的演唱會片段，更收錄從未曝光珍貴音樂、影像及故事。
在家駒誕生的六月，讓我們一起重新認識家駒，回顧他的光輝歲月，說聲「真的愛你」。

subtitle: Chinese,English
